📋 What's New
v5.17 — Current
  • Spotlight tutorial now highlights the full element with matching rectangular shape
  • Tutorial tooltip card is now semi-transparent so the highlighted element shows through
  • Google Sign-In now shows "Connecting…" and surfaces any errors if sign-in fails
v5.13
  • Per-screen spotlight tutorial — first visit to each page highlights key features
  • Quiz timer now pauses during the first-time quiz spotlight tour
  • Note Pad added to quiz screen — draw & write to work out problems by hand
  • Note Pad centered on screen (was previously a bottom sheet)
  • Spotlight circles tightened to fit individual elements precisely
  • Forgot PIN lightbox now appears above the PIN entry lightbox (z-index fix)
  • Change PIN dialog now properly resets and confirms after saving
  • Forgot password link added below password field on login screen
  • Name field is now required when creating an account
  • Feedback system with star ratings, categories, and comments
  • Email notifications sent to developer for every new feedback submission
  • Parent Controls moved to its own dedicated screen with PIN lightbox entry
  • Detailed changelog added inside Parent Controls (this screen)
  • Parallel data sync on login — both queries run simultaneously (2× faster)
  • "☁️ Syncing your data…" banner shown on home while data loads
  • Session persistence — auto-refresh token keeps users logged in longer
  • Service worker updated to network-first for index.html — no more stale caches
  • App auto-updates silently on next open after a new deployment
v5.12 — Google Sign-In, Auto-Update & Polish
  • Google Sign-In — Students and parents can sign in or create an account with one tap using their Google account. A "Continue with Google" button appears on the login screen, and Google One Tap shows automatically for a frictionless experience.
  • Sign Out button — Appears at the bottom of Settings when a user is logged in. Tapping it signs the user out and returns to the login screen.
  • Automatic silent updates — The app now updates itself automatically in the background whenever a new version is deployed. No more deleting the app from the home screen. A brief "✅ App updated!" toast appears after the update.
  • Double-tap zoom disabled — Double-tapping the screen no longer zooms in on iPhone and iPad, keeping the app feeling native.
  • Smoother screen transitions — The brief background flicker when navigating back between screens has been eliminated.
  • Login screen layout fix — The login screen is now more compact and no longer scrolls on small iPhone screens.
v5.11 — Cloud Accounts & Progress Sync
  • Cloud accounts & progress sync — Students can create a free account (email + password) and have their lesson completion and quiz scores automatically synced to the cloud. Progress is restored on any device after signing in.
  • Login screen — A branded sign-in / create account screen appears before the home page. Already signed-in users go straight to home. A "Continue without an account" link lets students skip and play as a guest.
  • Worked example operator fix — The + and = signs in visual worked examples are now perfectly centered between emoji groups instead of floating to the left.
  • Quiz Next button redesign — The Next Question button is now a small green pill on the right, paired opposite the Previous Question button on the left.
  • Title all-caps — The main page title is now displayed as MY MATH ROOTS.
v5.10 — iOS-Style Swipe-Back
  • iOS-style swipe-back — Drag from the left edge and the current screen slides with your finger while the previous screen appears behind it with a parallax effect. Release past 80px or with enough velocity to commit; release early to snap back. Works on Unit, Lesson, Results, History, and Settings screens.
  • Unit screen no-scroll fix — The unit screen now uses a flex layout so the banner, all lesson cards, and the Unit Quiz button always fit within the viewport on iPhone 16 Pro Max with no scrolling needed.
v5.9 — Contrast & Color Refresh
  • Contrast & color refresh — Light mode gradient is richer and more saturated; dark mode card backgrounds are distinctly lighter than the page background; background math bubbles are more visible in both modes; borders and shadows strengthened throughout.
  • Compact Unit Quiz button — The Unit Quiz start button is now a slim horizontal card instead of a large centered block, so the entire unit screen fits without scrolling.
  • Smaller unit banner — The colored unit header is more compact, giving more breathing room to the lesson list below it.
v5.8 — Charts, Dynamic Island & Update Banner
  • In-app update banner — "Update ready!" banner slides up when a new version is deployed. Fully automatic as of v5.12 — no user action required.
  • Tally chart scaling fix — SVG charts now scale to fit any screen width; previously cut off on iPhone.
  • iPhone Dynamic Island fix — All navigation bars now clear the Dynamic Island using env(safe-area-inset-top).
v5.6 — Quit, Start Over & Previous Question
  • Quit button on all quizzes & tests — A red Quit button now sits opposite the Start Over button. Tapping it shows a confirmation; confirming ends the quiz and records the attempt as Quit in score history.
  • Start Over confirmation — Restarting a quiz now shows a confirmation modal. The incomplete attempt is saved as Abandoned (DNF) in score history before the new attempt begins.
  • Previous Question button — A back arrow appears after the first question is answered, letting students review earlier answers in read-only mode.
  • Glass quiz cards — The question header and answer card now use the frosted-glass look matching the rest of the app.
  • Larger answer button spacing — Answer choices in the 2×2 grid have more padding and a bigger minimum height, making them easier to tap.
v5.5 — Answer Accuracy & Balance Fixes
  • Answer correctness fix — Best estimate for 724 − 283 corrected (was 500, correct is 400). Best estimate for 876 − 324 corrected (was 500, correct is 600). Fixed in qBank and testBank.
  • Answer position balance (Units 5, 6 & 7) — Corrected severe imbalance where the correct answer clustered at the same position. Unit 5: 84 rewrites. Unit 6: 65 fixes. Unit 7: 60 fixes.
  • Answer position balance (Units 1–4) — Same rebalancing applied to place value, addition/subtraction, skip counting, and rounding banks.
  • Explanation rewrites (Unit 2) — Removed contradictory wording; replaced circular explanations with clearer text.
  • 0 duplicate answer options confirmed — No question in the entire app has two or more identical choices.
v5.4 — Final Test
  • Final Test added — After completing all 10 units with 80%+, a 50-question Final Test card appears and draws questions from every unit.
  • Unit Quiz label corrected — The lessons screen now correctly shows "25 Questions" instead of "30".
  • Final Test card styled — Same rounded corners, white card background, and purple accent border to match unit cards.
  • Bug fix — Final Test button now launches correctly.
v5.3 — Color & Dark Mode Polish
  • Orange color now pops — Buttons and accents use a brighter, more vivid orange throughout the app.
  • Gold lock buttons — Lock/unlock buttons on both the home screen and lesson screen now use a consistent bright gold gradient.
  • Locked icons greyed out — Icons for locked units and lessons now appear in grayscale at reduced opacity.
  • Dark mode whites fixed — Text in dark mode is now true white, no longer muted or grey.
  • Settings text in dark mode brightened — Text inside settings boxes is brighter and clearly readable.
  • Bug fix — Entering the parent PIN in Settings after completing a quiz now stays on the Settings screen instead of jumping to results.
v5.1 — Individual Lesson & Unit Unlocks
  • Individual Lesson Unlock — Tap the lock on any locked lesson and enter your parent PIN to unlock just that lesson.
  • Individual Unit Unlock — Same method on the home screen for locked units.
  • Lock button tap area enlarged — Easier to tap the lock on both units and lessons without missing.
  • Scroll jitter fixed — Unit cards no longer jitter when scrolling to the top on iPhone or iPad.
  • Settings glass theme fixed — Settings boxes now correctly show the frosted glass look.
  • Re-Lock All — Now also clears all individual unit and lesson unlocks.
v5.0 — Glassmorphism UI Overhaul
  • Glassmorphism UI — Frosted glass units box and lesson cards, scroll-focus scaling, hover scale effect.
  • Home page no longer scrolls — Fits screen exactly; only the unit cards box scrolls internally.
  • iPhone safe area fix — Title no longer overlaps the notch or Dynamic Island in full-screen mode.
  • Install instructions updated — Tabbed interface for both iPhone and iPad; correct tab auto-selected by device.
  • School branding removed — App is now generic and reusable.
  • Forgot your PIN? — Solve a 3rd grade math problem to reset your PIN to 1234.
  • Sound Mute toggle — Added to Settings.
  • PIN limited to 4 digits — Numbers only, numeric keypad on iPad/iPhone.
v4.5–v4.9 — Resume, Sound & Timer Fixes
  • Pause & Resume (v4.0) — Quiz Back button now saves quiz progress. Backing out saves your place; orange Resume banner appears on return.
  • Resume banner (v4.5) — Start Quiz button is hidden when a quiz is already in progress. The Resume banner appears in its place.
  • Start Quiz button (v4.4) — Large Start Quiz button replaces the old banner.
  • Sound effects (v4.3) — Correct answer plays a bright chime, wrong answer plays a low buzz, passing a quiz plays a fanfare + confetti burst.
  • PIN settings fix (v4.6) — Fixed a bug where entering the PIN from the quiz results screen would exit Settings. Screen now auto-scrolls to Parent Controls after unlocking.
  • Timer adjustable (v3.6–v3.9) — In 1-minute steps (1–60 min lesson, 1–120 min unit).
  • Home button fix (v4.9) — Fixed the Home button broken by the v4.8 scrollable units box update.
  • Scrollable units box (v4.8) — All 10 unit cards moved into a compact scrollable box on the home page. Score History button stays always visible.
v3.1–v3.9 — Quiz Timer & Score History
  • Quiz Timer — 8 min lesson / 30 min unit with color warnings (orange under 2 min, red under 30 sec).
  • Score History — Cards expand to show right and wrong questions per attempt.
  • Column math examples — With carry digit alignment.
  • Examples and More Practice buttons — Added to every lesson.
  • Show/Hide Answer toggle — In practice section.
  • What's New section added — Version number tracked and displayed.
  • Default PIN is 1234 — Prompts to change on first use. PIN hides after unlocking.
v3.0 — Quiz Bug Fixes & Math Wallpaper
  • Quiz bug fixes — Results screen, Try Again, and Back buttons all work correctly.
  • Re-Lock All — Fully resets all progress and scores.
  • Math wallpaper — Added to all screens.
v1.0–v2.0 — Initial Release
  • Initial release — 10 units, 34 lessons, 2,502 questions covering all K–5 math standards.
  • Lesson quizzes (8 questions) and unit quizzes (25 questions)
  • Sequential unlock system — 80%+ on unit quiz required to advance
  • Star ratings: ⭐⭐⭐ (90%+), ⭐⭐ (70%+), ⭐ (below 70%)
  • Score history with tap-to-expand answer review per attempt
  • Parent Controls with 4-digit PIN protection
  • Dark mode and Light mode themes
  • PWA installable on iPhone & iPad via Safari — no App Store needed
  • Offline support — works without internet after first load
  • Student name personalization throughout the app
  • iPad installation support with step-by-step instructions
📲

Add to Home Screen

Works on iPhone & iPad — must use Safari
Takes less than a minute!

1

Open this page in Safari

⚠️ Must be Safari — Chrome or other browsers won't work
2

Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari

It looks like a box with an arrow pointing up (⬆) in the toolbar
3

Scroll down the Share menu and tap "Add to Home Screen"

It has a + icon next to it
4

Tap Add in the top-right corner

The name will say "My Math Roots" — leave it as is
✓

App icon now on your home screen!

Opens full screen, works offline, no Safari bar
1

Open this page in Safari

⚠️ Must be Safari — Chrome or other browsers won't work
2

Tap the Share button at the top of Safari

It's in the toolbar — looks like a box with an arrow pointing up (⬆)
3

Tap "Add to Home Screen" from the menu

You may need to scroll down in the Share sheet to find it
4

Tap Add in the top-right corner

The name will say "My Math Roots" — leave it as is
✓

App icon now on your home screen!

Opens full screen, works offline, no Safari address bar

Delete the app from your home screen, then clear Safari history & website data in Settings → Safari, and reinstall.
